name: Awakened Tide
description: Memory Revival awakening. NOTE: placeholder — real mechanics not public.

name: Awakened Ruin
description: Memory Revival awakening. NOTE: placeholder — real mechanics not public.

name: Awakened Bulwark
description: Memory Revival awakening. NOTE: placeholder — real mechanics not public.

name: Hero's Resourcefulness
description:
Burst becomes Burst Blast and can activate Spell Burst
All conditions of this trait that trigger on attack are changed to trigger on hit
The Base Trait effect that generates Rage from using Melee Skills is changed to generating Rage upon skill use. The effect that triggers Burst on attack hit is changed to triggering Burst Blaston hit
Hero Trait Exclusive: Berserker Rehan|Anger

name: Furious Roar
description:
Attacks trigger Burst once on Attack Critical Strike while Berserk is active. Cooldown: 0.3s
Hero Trait Exclusive: Berserker Rehan|Anger

name: Ancestral Hate
description:
对护盾返还间隔的额外加成也会作用于生命返还间隔
愠怒之灵 2 秒内每使用一次攻击技能，额外 +4% 玩家自身受到的击中伤害，最多 40%
愠怒之灵使用技能时，消耗 30% 当前生命
英雄特性限定：狂人·雷恩|怒影

name: Starfall Wasteland
description:
Seething Spirit now only uses Ranged Projectile Skills (except Channeled and Parabolic Skills)
Generates 15 Rage when using a Ranged Skill
+2 to Projectile Quantity, +2 Horizontal Projectile Jump(s), +2 Horizontal Projectile Penetration(s), +22% Projectile Size
for Ranged Skills cast by Seething Spirit66% chance for Ranged Projectiles launched by Seething Spirit to return after reaching their max range
Hero Trait Exclusive: Berserker Rehan|Seething Silhouette

name: Between the Holy Land and Hell
description:
Gains Repent to the Light for 8s after casting the Trait Skill
Hero Trait Exclusive: Lightbringer Rosa|High Court Chariot

name: Apathy Blade
description:
Intelligence no longer grants a damage bonus
Intelligence is the sum of Strength and Dexterity
+120% Strength and Dexterity
Hero Trait Exclusive: Lightbringer Rosa|Unsullied Blade

name: Mercury Purged
description:
Realm of Mercury keeps removing Elemental Ailments
When inflicting or removing Frostbite, grants Baptism: Impassive for 8s
When inflicting or removing Ignite, grants Baptism: Rage for 8s
When inflicting or removing Numbed, grants Baptism: Indolent for 8s
Hero Trait Exclusive: Lightbringer Rosa|Unsullied Blade

name: Telepathy Expert
description:
When Spacetime Illusion consumes Spell Burst, it also attempts to consume Spell Burst for Youga
Hero Trait Exclusive: Spacetime Witness Youga|Spacetime Illusion

name: Fifth Cosmic Velocity
description:
-99% additional Spell Burst Charge Speed
100% chance to immediately gain 2 stack(s) of Spell Burst Charge. Interval: 0.03s
Hero Trait Exclusive: Spacetime Witness Youga|Spacetime Illusion

name: To Myself in Another Spacetime
description:
对扭曲时空中的敌人造成伤害时，收割 1.5 秒持续伤害，该效果对同一目标有 2 秒回复时间
扭曲时空的释放间隔降低为 1 秒
+20% 扭曲时空记录的所有伤害
英雄特性限定：时空见证者·尤加|时空流逝

name: Private Universe
description:
+200% additional Twisted Spacetime Skill Area
+80% Spacetime Turbulence Duration
Twisted Spacetime only follows you
Hero Trait Exclusive: Spacetime Witness Youga|Spacetime Elapse

name: Artificial Moon: Origin
description:
Base Traits now have Special Memory slots that can be installed with an Ultimate or lower Origin Memory. Reduces the Base Stats and Random Affixes of Memories installed in this slot by 20%
Base Traits gain additional affixes upon reaching max level

name: Artificial Moon: Discipline
description:
Base Traits now have Special Memory slots that can be installed with an Ultimate or lower Discipline Memory. Reduces the Base Stats and the value of Random Affixes of Memories installed in this slot by 20%
Base Traits gain additional affixes upon reaching max level

name: Artificial Moon: Progress
description:
Base Traits now have Special Memory slots that can be installed with an Ultimate or lower Progress Memory. Reduces the Base Stats and Random Affixes of Memories installed in this slot by 20%
Base Traits gain additional affixes upon reaching max level

name: Discord of the Second Will
description:
When dealing damage, inflicts a random crowd control effect (except Freeze and Knockback), prioritizing effects that have not yet been inflicted. Interval: 1s
+200% inflicted Paralysis and Weaken Effect

name: Omni-Elixir Side Effect
description:
Scent Bottles add unselected Potion Ingredient effects, and the selected ingredients and their base effects will no longer take effect
Hero Trait Exclusive: Scent Weaver Sage|Licorice Note

name: Basic Pharmacology Manuscript
description:
+150% additional Ingredient Effect applied to Basic Scent Bottles
Hero Trait Exclusive: Scent Weaver Sage|Licorice Note

name: Soft Storm
description:
While in Vigilant, for every 2 use(s) of Enhanced Skills by Spirit Magi, triggers the Ultimate
Spirit Magi cannot use the Ultimate. -30% additional Ultimate Damage
Hero Trait Exclusive: The Forsaken Iris|Vigilant Breeze

name: Blowing Breeze
description:
While in Vigilant, for every 1 use(s) of the Ultimate by Spirit Magi, +1 to Max Breeze Stacks, up to 15 to Max Breeze Stacks, lasting until Reconjuring
Hero Trait Exclusive: The Forsaken Iris|Vigilant Breeze

name: Nourishing Spring Rain
description:
润物可以施加给智械召唤物
存在魔灵时，每 10 点生长值使智械召唤物额外 +9% 伤害，上限 +540%
存在魔灵时，每 1% 强化技能使用几率，智械召唤物 -2% 几率失去润物
模组化技能的冷却时间降低至 0.1 秒
英雄特性限定：遗世魔灵·伊瑞斯|生长的微风

name: Nature's Party
description:
Nourishment applies additional base effects:
Frost Magus: Restores 5% of Missing Life and Energy Shield to you on hit. Interval: 0.2s. +8 Max Frostbite Rating per Nourishment stack
Thunder Magus: Inflicts Numbed on hit. Interval: 0.2s. +4% additional Lightning Damage dealt to Numbed enemies per Nourishment stack
Fire Magus: +16% additional Critical Strike Damage and -20% Critical Strike Rating per Nourishment stack
Rock Magus: Transfers 20% of damage taken to this Minion, and adds Physical Damage equal to 0.05% of Armor per Nourishment stack, up to 100 Physical Damage per stack
Erosion Magus: Inflicts Deterioration on hit and +4% Deterioration Damage per Nourishment stack
Hero Trait Exclusive: The Forsaken Iris|Growing Breeze

name: Neural Synchronization Training
description:
After a Summon Skill is cast, you gain Overload for 4s
While a Synthetic Troop Minion exists, +125% additional Overload effect granted on yourself
For every 1 Command, +3% additional damage for you
Hero Trait Exclusive: Commander Moto|Order Calling

name: Machine's Joy
description:
+4% additional Overload Effect on hit. Stacks up to 30 time(s) (multiplies). Removes all stacks when casting a Trait Skill
Hero Trait Exclusive: Commander Moto|Order Calling

name: Peril of Synthetic Troops
description:
Adds 18% of the player's Max Life to the Base Life of Synthetic Troop Minions
Adds 12% of the player's Max Energy Shield to the Base Energy Shield of Synthetic Troop
Hero Trait Exclusive: Commander Moto|Charge Calling

name: Three-Chambered Heart
description:
The Main Skill is supported by a Lv. 40 Advanced Elemental Impact
Hero Trait Exclusive: Frostfire Gemma|Ice-Fire Fusion

name: First Flake of Strange Snow
description:
-50% additional Frostbite Effect
Each type of Crowd Control Effect, Ailment, and Curse afflicting an enemy is deemed to have 50 additional Frostbite Rating, up to 500
Hero Trait Exclusive: Frostfire Gemma|Frostbitten Heart

name: Sweet Pain
description:
Converts 99% Fire Damage to Erosion Damage
You have a Lv. 20 Precise: Erosion Amplification
You have a Lv. 20 Precise: Corrosion Focus
You have a Lv. 20 Erosion Magus Origin of Spirit Magus Effect
Hero Trait Exclusive: Frostfire Gemma|Flame of Pleasure

name: Royal Arsenal
description:
For every activated Magnificent Support Skill, +100% Projectile Speed, up to 300%
For every activated Noble Support Skill, +20% additional Projectile Damage, up to 60%
Hero Trait Exclusive: Divineshot Carino|Ranger of Glory

name: Into the Night
description:
+2 to Max Deflection
Deflection is no longer consumed when hit, but Deflection now only lasts for 3s
+50% additional Projectile Damage when Deflection is active
Hero Trait Exclusive: Divineshot Carino|Lethal Flash

name: Self-Imposed Shackles
description:
While standing still, +20% additional Heat Up Effect every 0.5s, up to 60%
While standing still, Heat Up gains an additional effect: +1% Skill Area for every stack of Heat Up
+20% Attack and Spell Block Chance and +20% Block Ratio Upper Limit for 8s when stopping moving
While moving, -60% Max Elemental Resistance and Erosion Resistance
Hero Trait Exclusive: Divineshot Carino|Zealot of War

name: Cat's Night Safari
description:
Gains 1 stack of Interest upon dealing damage to an Elite enemy. Interval: 1s
Gains Hunting Instinct when having 5 stack(s) of Interest
Hero Trait Exclusive: Cateye Erika|Wind Stalker

name: Charging Tail
description:
Feline Figure can now land Critical Strikes
On Critical Strike, the effect of Numbed inflicted within 10s by Feline Figure is doubled
Hero Trait Exclusive: Cateye Erika|Lightning Shadow

name: Vengeful Night Wraith
description:
For every 3 casts of Vendetta, generates 1 Phantom that casts Vendetta 1 additional time on a random target within 9m. The Phantom deals triple damage
Hero Trait Exclusive: Cateye Erika|Vendetta's Sting

name: The Place of Oracle
description:
During God's Boon, Tenacity Blessing and Agility Blessing gain an additional effect: +5% additional damage
Hero Trait Exclusive: Oracle Thea|Wisdom of The Gods

name: Immolating World
description:
Replaces the Main Skill with True Flame Immolation
During God's Boon, triggers True Flame Immolation once every 0.6s. The Interval is affected by Cast Speed
During God's Boon, each True Flame Immolation cast extends the duration of God's Boon by 0.2s
Hero Trait Exclusive: Oracle Thea|Wisdom of The Gods

name: Crossing the Divine Threshold
description:
Immune to Ailments, Crowd Control Effects, and Curses while inside the Divine Realm
+2 to max stacks of all Blessings when outside the Divine Realm
Hero Trait Exclusive: Oracle Thea|Incarnation of the Gods

name: Inverted Shrine
description:
Inflicts Desecration on yourself when inflicting Desecration
on enemies+99% additional Erosion Damage when inflicted with Desecration
Hero Trait Exclusive: Oracle Thea|Blasphemer

name: Bing's Big Bang Pack
description:
炸弹造成伤害时可额外生成 3 个备用炸弹，生成几率为炸弹暴击率的 33%；额外 -20% 备用炸弹伤害
英雄特性限定：逃脱者·宾|爆破新星

name: Genius Idea Generator
description:
+2 to Whimsy Explosion Projectile Quantity, +100% Whimsy Effect, +50% Whimsy Signal Effect
+2 to Max Spell Burst and +100% additional Spell Damage for Spells triggered by Ingenuity Overload
Hero Trait Exclusive: Escapist Bing|Creative Genius

name: Ceaseless Tide
description:
Deemed to be in the Loud Song state while in the Bard state
Attack, Cast, and Movement Speed are no longer additionally reduced while in the Loud Song state
Hero Trait Exclusive: Tide Whisper Selena|Sing with the Tide

name: Radical Evolution Theory: Cruelty
description: 100% of the final bonus applied to Origin of Spirit Magus Effect is also applied to Cruelty's Aura Effect bonus

name: Radical Evolution Theory: Spell Amplification
description: 100% of the final bonus applied to Origin of Spirit Magus Effect is also applied to Spell Amplification's Aura Effect bonus

name: Radical Evolution Theory: Radical Order
description: 100% of the final bonus applied to Origin of Spirit Magus Effect is also applied to Radical Order's Aura Effect bonus

name: Radical Evolution Theory: Deep Pain
description: 100% of the final bonus applied to Origin of Spirit Magus Effect is also applied to Deep Pain's Aura Effect bonus

name: Reactive Rainbow
description:
For every 1% excess chance to avoid Elemental Ailments, +0.5% chance to deem your Max Elemental Resistance as the effective Elemental Resistance
For every 1% excess chance to avoid Elemental Ailments, +0.5% chance to inflict Elemental Resistance Reversal on enemies when dealing Elemental Damage
